# OpenSearch Log Encoding Extension

This extension marshals logs into OpenSearch Simple Schema for Observability (SS4O) NDJSON format.

| Status        |           |
| ------------- |-----------|
| Stability     | [development]  |
| Distributions | [contrib] |
| Issues        | [![Open issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-search/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib?query=is%3Aissue%20is%3Aopen%20label%3Aextension%2Fopensearchlogencoding%20&label=open&color=orange&logo=opentelemetry)](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aextension%2Fopensearchlogencoding) [![Closed issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-search/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib?query=is%3Aissue%20is%3Aclosed%20label%3Aextension%2Fopensearchlogencoding%20&label=closed&color=blue&logo=opentelemetry)](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/issues?q=is%3Aclosed+is%3Aissue+label%3Aextension%2Fopensearchlogencoding) |
| [Code Owners](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#becoming-a-code-owner)    | [@joluc](https://www.github.com/joluc) |

## Configuration

No configuration options. The extension produces SS4O NDJSON output.

```yaml
extensions:
  opensearch_log_encoding:

exporters:
  kafka:
    brokers:
      - localhost:9092
    logs:
      topic: otel-logs
      encoding: opensearch_log_encoding
```

## Output Format

Each log record is encoded as a JSON object on a single line:

```json
{"@timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:45.123456789Z","body":"log message","severity":{"text":"INFO","number":9},"attributes":{"key":"value"},"resource":{"service.name":"my-service"},"instrumentationScope":{"name":"my-logger","version":"1.0"}}
```

### Fields

| Field | Description | Presence |
|---|---|---|
| `@timestamp` | Log timestamp (RFC3339Nano) | Always |
| `body` | Log body as string | Always |
| `observedTimestamp` | When the log was observed (RFC3339Nano) | If set |
| `traceId` | Hex-encoded trace ID | If set |
| `spanId` | Hex-encoded span ID | If set |
| `severity.text` | Severity level name | Always |
| `severity.number` | Severity level number | Always |
| `attributes` | Log record attributes | Always |
| `resource` | Resource attributes (string values) | Always |
| `schemaUrl` | Schema URL | If set |
| `instrumentationScope` | Scope name, version, attributes | Always |
